titleStmt.title: SII 20.98: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 98. (B.K. No. 35 of 1936-37.) KAḌLĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the Svāmiliṅga temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 2, Plavaṁga, Pushya, śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1127, December 25.

The inscription states that the king who was ruling from his capital at Jayantipura, paid a visit to the temple of Svayaṁbhū Sōmanātha at Kaḍalevāḍa and made a gift of income from Mēlāḷke of the village Hiṁchagēri situated in Bāgavāḍi 30 a kaṁpaṇa of Alande-1000 Division. The gift was entrusted to Gaṅgarāsidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī Ōṁ namaśivāya namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāma
racāravē ttraiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti sama
stabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ pa
1) The imprecatory passages which follow are effaced.

ramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷa tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu bhūSome space is left after kuḷa
lōkamalladēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivridhdhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire jayaṁtīpurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirddu © svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramabhūlō
kavaruśada yereḍeneya plavaṅgasaṁvatsarada pusya suddha paṁcami
yādityavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti vyatīpāta nimittaṁ śrīmat
bhūlōkamalladēvaru kaḍalevāḍada śrī svayaṁbhūsōmanāthadēvara samīpakke bi
jayaṁgeydu śōḍaśamahādānaṁgaḷaṁ māḍi tatuprasthāvadalu Alaṁdesā
sirada kaṁpaṇaṁ bāgavāḍimūvattaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ hiṁcagēriya mēlāḷkeyaṁ
śrīmatu sōmanāthadēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ dhūpadīpanaivēdyakkaṁ gaṁgarāsidēvargge
kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 20.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
